title: Smoky Crumbly Japanese Dates Stir-fry
description: This Smoky Crumbly Japanese Dates Stir-fry is perfect for a cozy date night with its blend of crispy dates and tender vegetables, served broiled to perfection.
instructions: Prepare the dates by removing any pits and cutting them into small pieces.
Wash and chop the broccoli florets, bell peppers, and mince the garlic cloves.

In a large mixing bowl, combine the prepared dates with the chopped vegetables, minced garlic, soy sauce, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and ginger powder. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender and dates are slightly crisp on top but still chewy inside.
Serve hot as a side dish or a main course, garnished with sesame seeds if desired.
